proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_cetuximab have different mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_bevacizumab have different mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have different mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_encorafenib have different mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib have different mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_regorafenib have higher mean pfs_months than those who do not.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with kras_mutation have lower mean pfs_months than KRAS-wild-type patients.
Patients with nras_mutation have different mean pfs_months than NRAS-wild-type patients.
Patients with braf_v600e have lower mean pfs_months than BRAF-wild-type patients.
Patients with msi_high have different mean pfs_months than MSS patients.
Patients with her2_amplified have different mean pfs_months than HER2-non-amplified patients.
Patients with ntrk_fusion have different mean pfs_months than NTRK-wild-type patients.
Patients with stage_iv have lower mean pfs_months than non-stage-IV patients.
Patients with right_sided_primary have lower mean pfs_months than left-sided patients.
sex_female is associated with mean pfs_months.
Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months.
age_years is linearly associated with pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting jointly for age_years, sex_female, ecog_ps, stage_iv, right_sided_primary, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, cea_ng_ml, weight_loss_pct_6mo, crp_mg_l, nlr, and hemoglobin_g_dl, ecog_ps, stage_iv, right_sided_primary, cea_ng_ml, ldh_u_l and weight_loss_pct_6mo independently shorten pfs_months while age_years and albumin_g_dl independently lengthen it.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + ecog_ps + stage_iv + right_sided_primary + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + cea_ng_ml + weight_loss_pct_6mo + crp_mg_l + nlr + hemoglobin_g_dl', data=df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among msi_high=1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab increases mean pfs_months relative to no pembrolizumab; among msi_high=0 patients there is no such effect, yielding a positive treatment_pembrolizumab x msi_high interaction.

analyses.result_summary: Pembro effect in msi1: on=4.30 (n=396) off=4.29 (n=2117)
Pembro effect in msi0: on=4.32 (n=7264) off=4.31 (n=40223)

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * msi_high + age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv', data=df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among kras_mutation=0 AND nras_mutation=0 AND braf_v600e=0 (RAS/RAF wild-type) patients, treatment_cetuximab increases mean pfs_months; the cetuximab x ras_raf_wt interaction is positive.
Within RAS/RAF wild-type AND right_sided_primary=0 (left-sided), treatment_cetuximab increases mean pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Cetux effect in ras_raf_wt: on=4.44 (n=7691) off=4.49 (n=17633)
Cetux effect in ras_raf_mut: on=4.12 (n=7387) off=4.15 (n=17289)

Cetux in RAS/RAF-wt + right-sided: on=4.11 (n=2624) off=4.14 (n=6257)

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among braf_v600e=1 patients, treatment_encorafenib increases mean pfs_months; in braf_v600e=0 patients there is no effect; treatment_encorafenib x braf_v600e interaction is positive.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_encorafenib * braf_v600e + age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv', data=df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among her2_amplified=1 patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib increases mean pfs_months; in her2_amplified=0 patients there is no effect; treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib x her2_amplified interaction is positive.
Within her2_amplified=1 AND kras_mutation=0 (HER2+ KRAS-wild-type), treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib increases mean pfs_months relative to within her2_amplified=1 AND kras_mutation=1.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib * her2_amplified + age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv', data=df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, right_sided_primary, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l and cea_ng_ml, treatment_bevacizumab independently changes mean pfs_months.
treatment_bevacizumab interacts with kras_mutation, right_sided_primary, msi_high, stage_iv, ecog_ps, or braf_v600e on pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_bevacizumab + age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + right_sided_primary + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + cea_ng_ml', data=df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, and cea_ng_ml, treatment_regorafenib independently increases mean pfs_months.
treatment_regorafenib effect on pfs_months is suppressed (negative interaction) by kras_mutation.
treatment_regorafenib effect on pfs_months is enhanced (positive interaction) in nras_mutation patients.
treatment_regorafenib effect on pfs_months is suppressed by braf_v600e.
treatment_regorafenib effect on pfs_months is suppressed by right_sided_primary.
treatment_regorafenib effect on pfs_months is suppressed by her2_amplified.
treatment_regorafenib effect on pfs_months is suppressed by higher ecog_ps.
treatment_regorafenib effect on pfs_months is not modified by msi_high, ntrk_fusion, stage_iv, or sex_female.
Among kras_mutation=0 patients, treatment_regorafenib increases pfs_months; among kras_mutation=1 patients, the effect is null.
Among braf_v600e=0 patients, treatment_regorafenib increases pfs_months; among braf_v600e=1 patients, the effect is null.
Among right_sided_primary=0 (left-sided) patients, treatment_regorafenib increases pfs_months; among right_sided_primary=1 patients, the effect is null.

Within the joint subgroup kras_mutation=0 AND braf_v600e=0 AND right_sided_primary=0, treatment_regorafenib substantially increases pfs_months relative to non-regorafenib patients in the same subgroup; outside this subgroup the effect is null.
treatment_regorafenib increases pfs_months at every ecog_ps stratum (0, 1, 2), so ecog_ps modifies baseline pfs_months but does not abolish the regorafenib effect.
Within kras_mutation=0 AND braf_v600e=0 AND right_sided_primary=0 AND ecog_ps=0, treatment_regorafenib produces an even larger absolute pfs_months gain than in the same biomarker subgroup overall.
Higher cea_ng_ml suppresses the treatment_regorafenib pfs_months benefit (negative interaction).
Higher albumin_g_dl suppresses the treatment_regorafenib pfs_months benefit (negative interaction).

Higher ldh_u_l, weight_loss_pct_6mo, nlr or sodium_meq_l enhance the treatment_regorafenib effect; higher crp_mg_l, bun_mg_dl suppress it; remaining labs (age_years, hemoglobin_g_dl, alkaline_phosphatase_u_l, ast_u_l, alt_u_l, total_bilirubin_mg_dl, creatinine_mg_dl, potassium_meq_l, calcium_mg_dl) show no interaction with treatment_regorafenib on pfs_months.

In a joint regression including treatment_regorafenib x kras_mutation, treatment_regorafenib x braf_v600e, and treatment_regorafenib x right_sided_primary plus age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, cea_ng_ml, the baseline regorafenib effect (KRAS-wt, BRAF-wt, left-sided) is large and positive, and each of the three interactions is significantly negative and roughly equal in magnitude to the baseline effect — i.e., each unfavorable predicate fully neutralises the regorafenib benefit.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_regorafenib * kras_mutation + treatment_regorafenib * braf_v600e + treatment_regorafenib * right_sided_primary + age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + albumin_g_dl + cea_ng_ml', data=df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, msi_high, albumin_g_dl, cea_ng_ml, treatment_pembrolizumab does not change pfs_months.
treatment_pembrolizumab does not interact with msi_high, kras_mutation, braf_v600e, right_sided_primary, stage_iv, ecog_ps, or her2_amplified on pfs_months.
treatment_cetuximab does not interact with kras_mutation, nras_mutation, braf_v600e, msi_high, her2_amplified, right_sided_primary, stage_iv, ecog_ps or sex_female on pfs_months.

treatment_encorafenib does not interact with kras_mutation, nras_mutation, braf_v600e, her2_amplified, right_sided_primary, stage_iv, ecog_ps, treatment_cetuximab, or treatment_bevacizumab on pfs_months.
treatment_encorafenib has a negative interaction with msi_high on pfs_months (effect more negative when MSI-high).
treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib does not interact with any of kras_mutation, nras_mutation, braf_v600e, msi_high, her2_amplified, right_sided_primary, stage_iv, or ecog_ps on pfs_months.
treatment_bevacizumab does not interact with nras_mutation, her2_amplified, ntrk_fusion, sex_female, ecog_ps, stage_iv, or right_sided_primary on pfs_months.

Across the 2x2x2 grid of kras_mutation x braf_v600e x right_sided_primary, treatment_regorafenib has a strong positive pfs_months effect ONLY in the (kras_mutation=0, braf_v600e=0, right_sided_primary=0) cell; in every other cell with patients available the effect is statistically null.

Removing any one of the three predicates (kras_mutation=0, braf_v600e=0, right_sided_primary=0) from the regorafenib subgroup definition reduces the estimated treatment_regorafenib pfs_months effect, confirming that all three predicates contribute to defining the responsive subgroup.

analyses.result_summary: Rego in KRAS-wt + BRAF-wt + left-sided: on=6.88 (n=3461) off=4.12 (n=13911); diff=2.76

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among nras_mutation=1 patients, treatment_regorafenib increases pfs_months; the estimated effect is enhanced when the additional KRAS-wt + BRAF-wt + left-sided predicates also hold, but NRAS status itself is not required to define the responsive subgroup (because nras_mutation=1 is essentially a subset of kras_mutation=0).

FINAL SUBGROUP: treatment_regorafenib increases pfs_months relative to no regorafenib in the subgroup defined by (kras_mutation=0 AND braf_v600e=0 AND right_sided_primary=0); the unfavorable values of any of these three predicates (kras_mutation=1, braf_v600e=1, or right_sided_primary=1) suppress the regorafenib benefit toward zero.

Within the regorafenib responder subgroup (kras_mutation=0 AND braf_v600e=0 AND right_sided_primary=0), none of treatment_cetuximab, treatment_bevacizumab, treatment_pembrolizumab, treatment_encorafenib or treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib changes pfs_months — i.e., the subgroup-specific benefit is unique to regorafenib.

In a regression with treatment_regorafenib interactions for kras_mutation, braf_v600e, and right_sided_primary plus adjustment for age_years, ecog_ps and stage_iv, the baseline (KRAS-wt + BRAF-wt + left-sided) regorafenib effect on pfs_months is approximately +2.3 months and is highly significant.

analyses.result_summary: Rego in KRAS-wt + BRAF-wt + left-sided: on=6.88 (n=3461) off=4.12 (n=13911); diff=2.76

treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib in rego-best subgroup: on=4.59(n=1367) off=4.67(n=16005)

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_regorafenib + treatment_regorafenib:kras_mutation + treatment_regorafenib:braf_v600e + treatment_regorafenib:right_sided_primary + kras_mutation + braf_v600e + right_sided_primary + age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Final model rego baseline (KRAS-wt, BRAF-wt, left, ECOG=0, stage non-IV) effect = 2.270 months
